race.comment: MAWJOOD (4) at his top for this and can stalk the speed after going under narrowly when third over 1400m at Randwick in this class last Saturday in the heavy (10) going. No excuses today. CELLARMASTER (1) handy gelding who will appreciate the blinkers going on as he stretches out to the 1500m with the claim. Was a month between runs when he tired late with the 61.5kg to run third over 1400m at Randwick Kensington. Has a soft track win on his CV and should get the right run. AMPLIFY (6) talented mare who comes back in grade today after finishing ninth in the LR Silk Stocking at the Gold Coast over 1400m first-up. Placed on a heavy track and look for her launching late. MAN OF WORTH (2) fitter now and Grima keeps the ride from a good gate. Earlier runs were strong and sure to be thereabouts. FIDDLERS GREEN (3) deep into the prep and kept up to the mark with a 740m tick over trial. Well drawn and can take a hand in the finish.
